vulnerability.reference: Overconfident exploration in safety-critical tasks leaves dangerous state regions untested.
vulnerability.generated: Engineers deploy ensemble-based exploration without real-time ability to detect overestimated information gain in high-dimensional spaces.

impact.reference: Physical injury, property damage, and erosion of public trust in autonomous systems in shared environments.
impact.generated: Misdirected exploration causes inefficient training, suboptimal continuous control policies, and task failure.

dose_response.reference: Miscalibrated novelty from off-policy exploration overestimates information gain, causing robotics engineers to deploy systems that leave dangerous states untested, leading to physical injury and public distrust.
dose_response.generated: Off-policy exploration with replay buffers produces miscalibrated novelty estimates, through robotics engineers deploying RL exploration, triggers ensemble-based exploration without real-time detection of overestimated information gain in high-dimensional spaces, leading to inefficient training, suboptimal policies, and task failure.
